dict.string: NexGenSpec needs camera access to capture inspection photos and scan documents.
NexGenSpec uses the microphone for voice commands and audio notes.
Speech recognition allows hands-free commands and note dictation during inspections.
Used for importing/exporting inspection images and annotations.
NexGenSpec supports Bluetooth headsets and microphones for hands-free voice commands during inspections.
NexGenSpec uses your location to auto-fill the property address when creating a new inspection.
Used for secure authentication if enabled (optional).
